reviews.review_text: Great place only 4 caravan bays not suited to big vans

Really nice community beach across road all costs go to country women's charity powered
Site$30 non powered $20 you have your own separate amenities as well
Great value for money...right across from the beach. Separate ensuite. Power and water.

A great 4 site park used by the CWA as a source of income. Each site has their own private ensuite block. Situated right across the road from the beach and around the corner from the Pub, this site is a great option for anyone with a smaller sized setup (maximum 16ft, 18ft if you get the site closest to the road)
Do yourself a favor this is a great place to stay for a few days & explore coffin Bay and Port Lincoln

It's a little old style, but so is the hospitality - super friendly and helpful.
A bonus is that each site has a private bathroom and toilet.

What a gem! Such an excellent location, beach across the road, short walk to shops.  Nice to have own toilet and shower, free laundry. A short walk away, try the Bluewater Beach Cafe for some wonderful authentic Greek food and friendly staff . Also excellent pizza.
Great place to stay. Well thought out laundry with  washing basket and pegs. Comfortable  ensuites, spectacular ocean view. Valerie  made us so welcome!
